title: Nvidia bets on AI inference as chip revenue opportunity hits $1 ...
full_text: CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a new central processor and an AI system built on technology from Groq - a chip startup from which Nvidia licensed technology for $17 billion in December at its annual GTC developer conference in San Jose, California. Sign up here. The moves are part of Huang's bid to firm
